name: attestation-placement
description: Sigstore bundle file placement rules per pack.md Section 6

tests.name: wrong_directory
tests.description: Attestations MUST be in attestations/ directory

tests.name: at_root
tests.description: Attestations MUST NOT be at archive root

tests.name: multiple_signers
tests.description: Each signer's attestation MUST be in a separate file

verification_requirements.name: recompute_manifest_digest
verification_requirements.description: Verifiers MUST recompute manifest digest and compare against bundle subject

verification_requirements.name: verify_sigstore_bundle
verification_requirements.description: Verifiers MUST verify Sigstore bundle against trusted root

verification_requirements.name: verify_signer_identity
verification_requirements.description: Verifiers SHOULD verify certificate identity matches expected signer

notes: Attestations are Sigstore bundles stored as .sigstore.json files in the attestations/ directory. Verification uses sigstore-go against the public Sigstore trusted root.
